evidences.content: The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at . Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source. [...] This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from November 7 12:00 PM ET to November 14, 2025 12:00 PM ET. For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count. Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as will be counted by the tracker. Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes). Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total. evidences.title: Elon Musk thanked President Donald Trump in a post on ... - Facebook
evidences.content: ## The Hodgetwins's Post ### The Hodgetwins November 20, 2025 · Elon Musk thanked President Donald Trump in a post on X (formerly Twitter) on November 19, 2025, saying, "I would like to thank Donald Trump for all he has done for America and the world." This came shortly after Trump made a comment at a U.S.–Saudi investment forum asking, “Has he ever thanked me properly?” while referencing Musk. Musk's message appears to signal a shift toward a more cordial relationship with Trump, following months of tension and public disputes between the two. The interaction between Musk and Trump follows a period of high-profile feuding, including Trump’s public remarks and Musk's comments on the state of their relationship. evidences.title: Elon Musk Tweets 2010 to 2025 (April) - Kaggle
evidences.content: The business magnate Elon Musk initiated an acquisition of the American social media company Twitter, Inc. on April 14, 2022, and concluded it on October 27, 2022. Musk had begun buying shares of the company in January 2022, becoming its largest shareholder by April with a 9.1 percent ownership stake. _(Wikipedia)_ By early 2024, Musk had become a vocal and financial supporter of Donald Trump. _(Washington Post)_ The data was collected and combined for the publication _Poster boy: Six instances of Kremlin disinformation amplified through Elon Musk’s social network (The Insider, 2025-03-12)_. Below are two visualisations based of this data.
